출애굽기 39:1.content: Of the blue, purple, and scarlet, they made finely worked garments for ministering in the holy place, and made the holy garments for Aaron, as Yahweh commanded Moses.

출애굽기 39:2.content: He made the ephod of gold, blue, purple, scarlet, and fine twined linen.

출애굽기 39:3.content: They beat the gold into thin plates, and cut it into wires, to work it in with the blue, the purple, the scarlet, and the fine linen, the work of the skillful workman.

출애굽기 39:4.content: They made shoulder straps for it, joined together. It was joined together at the two ends.

출애굽기 39:5.content: The skillfully woven band that was on it, with which to fasten it on, was of the same piece, like its work: of gold, of blue, purple, scarlet, and fine twined linen, as Yahweh commanded Moses.

출애굽기 39:6.content: They worked the onyx stones, enclosed in settings of gold, engraved with the engravings of a signet, according to the names of the children of Israel.

출애굽기 39:7.content: He put them on the shoulder straps of the ephod, to be stones of memorial for the children of Israel, as Yahweh commanded Moses.

출애굽기 39:8.content: He made the breastplate, the work of a skillful workman, like the work of the ephod: of gold, of blue, purple, scarlet, and fine twined linen.

출애굽기 39:9.content: It was square. They made the breastplate double. Its length was a span, and its width a span, being double.

출애굽기 39:10.content: They set in it four rows of stones. A row of ruby, topaz, and beryl was the first row;

출애굽기 39:11.content: and the second row, a turquoise, a sapphire, and an emerald;

출애굽기 39:12.content: and the third row, a jacinth, an agate, and an amethyst;

출애굽기 39:13.content: and the fourth row, a chrysolite, an onyx, and a jasper. They were enclosed in gold settings.

출애굽기 39:14.content: The stones were according to the names of the children of Israel, twelve, according to their names; like the engravings of a signet, everyone according to his name, for the twelve tribes.

출애굽기 39:15.content: They made on the breastplate chains like cords, of braided work of pure gold.

출애굽기 39:16.content: They made two settings of gold, and two gold rings, and put the two rings on the two ends of the breastplate.

출애굽기 39:17.content: They put the two braided chains of gold in the two rings at the ends of the breastplate.

출애굽기 39:18.content: The other two ends of the two braided chains they put on the two settings, and put them on the shoulder straps of the ephod, in its front.

출애굽기 39:19.content: They made two rings of gold, and put them on the two ends of the breastplate, on its edge, which was toward the side of the ephod inward.

출애굽기 39:20.content: They made two more rings of gold, and put them on the two shoulder straps of the ephod underneath, in its front, close by its coupling, above the skillfully woven band of the ephod.

출애굽기 39:21.content: They bound the breastplate by its rings to the rings of the ephod with a lace of blue, that it might be on the skillfully woven band of the ephod, and that the breastplate might not come loose from the ephod, as Yahweh commanded Moses.

출애굽기 39:22.content: He made the robe of the ephod of woven work, all of blue.

출애굽기 39:23.content: The opening of the robe in the middle of it was like the opening of a coat of mail, with a binding around its opening, that it should not be torn.

출애굽기 39:24.content: They made on the skirts of the robe pomegranates of blue, purple, scarlet, and twined linen.

출애굽기 39:25.content: They made bells of pure gold, and put the bells between the pomegranates around the skirts of the robe, between the pomegranates;

출애굽기 39:26.content: a bell and a pomegranate, a bell and a pomegranate, around the skirts of the robe, to minister in, as Yahweh commanded Moses.

출애굽기 39:27.content: They made the tunics of fine linen of woven work for Aaron and for his sons,

출애굽기 39:28.content: the turban of fine linen, the linen headbands of fine linen, the linen trousers of fine twined linen,

출애굽기 39:29.content: the sash of fine twined linen, blue, purple, and scarlet, the work of the embroiderer, as Yahweh commanded Moses.

출애굽기 39:30.content: They made the plate of the holy crown of pure gold, and wrote on it an inscription, like the engravings of a signet: “HOLY TO YAHWEH”.

출애굽기 39:31.content: They tied to it a lace of blue, to fasten it on the turban above, as Yahweh commanded Moses.

출애굽기 39:32.content: Thus all the work of the tabernacle of the Tent of Meeting was finished. The children of Israel did according to all that Yahweh commanded Moses; so they did.

출애굽기 39:33.content: They brought the tabernacle to Moses: the tent, with all its furniture, its clasps, its boards, its bars, its pillars, its sockets,

출애굽기 39:34.content: the covering of rams’ skins dyed red, the covering of sea cow hides, the veil of the screen,

출애굽기 39:35.content: the ark of the covenant with its poles, the mercy seat,

출애굽기 39:36.content: the table, all its vessels, the show bread,

출애굽기 39:37.content: the pure lamp stand, its lamps, even the lamps to be set in order, all its vessels, the oil for the light,

출애굽기 39:38.content: the golden altar, the anointing oil, the sweet incense, the screen for the door of the Tent,

출애굽기 39:39.content: the bronze altar, its grating of bronze, its poles, all of its vessels, the basin and its base,

출애굽기 39:40.content: the hangings of the court, its pillars, its sockets, the screen for the gate of the court, its cords, its pins, and all the instruments of the service of the tabernacle, for the Tent of Meeting,

출애굽기 39:41.content: the finely worked garments for ministering in the holy place, the holy garments for Aaron the priest, and the garments of his sons, to minister in the priest’s office.

출애굽기 39:42.content: According to all that Yahweh commanded Moses, so the children of Israel did all the work.

출애굽기 39:43.content: Moses saw all the work, and behold, they had done it as Yahweh had commanded. They had done so; and Moses blessed them.
